channel.title: The Verified Brief
channel.description: Verified AI-frontier intelligence. Every claim cross-examined, tagged, and sourced. By AikinStarkins.

item.title: Issue 002 — Which AI-agent capabilities are real in 2026 vs. agent-washing
item.description: Real agent capability vs. marketing — with the viral numbers that don't survive a second look.

item.title: Issue 001 — Where AI agents actually make money, and who owns the work
item.description: The casino vs. the real business, and the 2026 law on AI authorship.

item.title: About / Method — the one rule that makes this different
item.description: Every claim tagged verified/soft/refuted, sourced; we publish what we couldn't confirm.
